title: Public hearing decision for the case of Charles Salvador
body: "A judicial Parole Board member, on behalf of the Board Chair, has not granted the application for Charles Salvador’s parole hearing to be made public.  More information about the reasons for this decision are attached.  For more detail on applying for a parole hearing to be made public, please read more here: Applying for a Parole review to be public - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk) "
